A COTTAGE ON LAKE LOUISE SUSTAINED ROOF AND CHIMNEY DAMAGE WHEN A 18-INCH DIAMETER 50+ FOOT SPRUCE TREE WAS UPROOTED BY THUNDERSTORM WINDS. THE STORM ALSO SHEARED OFF A FLAGPOLE AND DAMAGED A KAYAK, PADDLE BOARD AND HEAVY PATIO FURNITURE.
